sanskrit: प्रह्लादश्चास्मि दैत्यानां कालः कलयतामहम् । मृगाणां च मृगेन्द्रोऽहं वैनतेयश्च पक्षिणाम् ॥
hindiTranslation: दैत्योंमें प्रह्लाद और गणना करनेवालोंमें काल मैं हूँ  ।  पशुओंमें सिंह और पक्षियोंमें गरुड मैं हूँ ॥
englishTranslation: Among the daityas I am Prahlada; among calculators I am Time. Among beasts I am the lion, and among birds I am Garuda.
essence: Power, devotion, and majesty are all windows into one presence.
speaker: Krishna
